The Vow (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $125,014,030Details
International Box Office $72,604,130
Worldwide Box Office $197,618,160
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $28,834,570
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,710,954
Total $34,545,524
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A newlywed couple recovers from a car accident that puts the wife in a coma. Waking up with severe memory loss, her husband endeavors to win her heart again.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$41,202,458 (33.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.03 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,958 opening theaters/3,038 max. theaters, 6.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $187,835,149

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 10th, 2012 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: February 9th, 2012 (Wide) (Serbia and Montenegro)
February 10th, 2012 (Wide) (Austria)
February 10th, 2012 (Wide), released as Votos de amor (Mexico)
March 16th, 2012 (Wide) (Venezuela)
March 22nd, 2012 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: May 8th, 2012 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for an accident scene, sexual content, partial nudity and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2192, 10/5/2011)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Plot point: Faulty Memory, Medical and Hospitals, Romance
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, Spyglass Entertainment, Birnbaum/Barber
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.
